iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All tags are present in the correct order and contain valid content.
2. Payoff alignment: OK. Accepting at 60 ZUP is exactly at my maximum willingness to pay, so it maximizes my utility. No improvement possible.
3. Opponent plausibility: OK. RED proposed 60 ZUP and stated it was a "fair price," so acceptance is highly likely.
4. Consistency: OK. The <reason> clearly explains why I am accepting, and the <message> reinforces this acceptance.
5. Rule compliance: OK. I have used only two proposals and am now accepting, adhering to the turn and proposal limits.
</critique>
